opening.note: User supplied opening video optimized to a muted mobile MP4. GIF conversion was avoided because MP4 is lighter and smoother for this 4.9 second portrait clip.

playerDirectionRemap.note: Movement math stays stable. Only the player visual frame set is remapped so 11/1 and 3/9 o'clock no longer show the opposite image.

ui.openingBubble: top speech bubble over full-screen MP4
ui.aquaCardSkin: shared card, blur, X close, and no text-shadow rules are maintained
